detectors.description:
Deprecated standard detected secretNumber = uint8(sha3()(now,block.blockhash(block.number - 1))) % 5 + 1 (SmallRoulette.sol#55):
	- Usage of "block.blockhash()" should be replaced with "blockhash()"
	- Usage of "sha3()" should be replaced with "keccak256()"

	- Usage of "sha3()" should be replaced with "keccak256()"

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SmallRoulette.play(uint256) (SmallRoulette.sol#61-91):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.transfer(this.balance) (SmallRoulette.sol#81)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- lastPlayed = now (SmallRoulette.sol#89)
	- shuffle() (SmallRoulette.sol#87)
		- secretNumber = uint8(sha3()(now,block.blockhash(block.number - 1))) % 5 + 1 (SmallRoulette.sol#55)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [SmallRoulette.play(uint256)](SmallRoulette.sol#L61-L91):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.transfer(this.balance)](SmallRoulette.sol#L81)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [lastPlayed = now](SmallRoulette.sol#L89)
	- [shuffle()](SmallRoulette.sol#L87)
		- [secretNumber = uint8(sha3()(now,block.blockhash(block.number - 1))) % 5 + 1](SmallRoulette.sol#L55)
